text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's the season for summer camp, but as we kick
into full gear in preparation for the fall G1
races...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Geez, there's no helpin' that dummy. But of all
the things to fight over...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Oh, Trainer. Turns out my li'l bro got into a scrap
with some local squirt.

text_block_list.name: Neighborhood Boy
text_block_list.text:
Heh, Oguri Cap's da best! Her runnin's somethin'
else! Oguri Cap's gonna dominate her whole
generation.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross's Little Brother
text_block_list.text: Nuh-uh! My big sis Tama's da toughest of 'em all!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
The way Oguri ran has got everyone real hyped
up. Well... I guess I can kinda see why.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
She looked real flashy out there. 'Specially in the
last stretch, when she was fightin' for first...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Oguri's style always makes for a thrilling finish. It
gets so close, no one can tell who's gonna come
out on top.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Still, however intense things get, a win's a win. If
it were me, I'd rather be first than flashy, y'know?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: So how does Oguri keep pullin' stunts like that?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tamamo Cross can't seem to take her mind off
Oguri Cap.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In situations like these, there's only one thing to
do.
choice_data_list:
Why not ask her yourself? Here at summer
camp.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: You want me to go ask Oguri? Here?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
...Ya got a point. Y'know, I've been wonderin'
what she thinks about when she's runnin'.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
I just never got a good opening to ask, y'know?
It'd be embarrassing to pester about it in our
room. Haha...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
We won't be racin' against each other this fall.
She's still in her classic year.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
But we're gonna be runnin' together at some
point, so it'd prob'ly be good to ask what kinda
emotions she's dealin' with, y'know?, Before we're
competin'!
